name: @conductor/agent-memory
description: Conversation memory + accounts for the agent runtime — in-memory by default, self-provisioning Postgres when DATABASE_URL is set.
comment: Zero-setup Postgres: set DATABASE_URL and PgStore creates its own tables on first use (no CLI). `pg` is lazy-imported, so it stays a no-op until DATABASE_URL is set. PrismaStore remains as an alternative for teams who prefer Prisma migrations.
